rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution around testing goal-progress theories and reports nonmonotonic progress patterns (including inverted-U/resource-slack and “stuck in the middle”), while the cited JMR paper is a core goal-stage account showing a middle-stage motivational slump and U-shaped attention dynamics. Given this strong construct-level overlap in goal-pursuit stage dynamics, the citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
